mnemonics: P - Pointer is a variable that holds the memory address of another variable
P - Pointers are used to indirectly access variables
keyPoints: Pointer Concepts: Pointers are variables that store memory addresses
Accessing Variables through Pointers: * operator used to get the value stored at a memory address
Pointer Applications: Pointers used in functions, structures, and arrays
Dynamic Memory Allocation Functions: malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), free()
